tasks.title: Maintain coordination.md as the live status board
tasks.description: Update the agent status table and PR log every time an agent opens, blocks, or merges a PR.

tasks.title: PR review: token, copy, and state-enum compliance
tasks.description: Run the PR checklist in coordination.md against every PR before approving. No hex literals, no banned words, no enum drift.

tasks.title: Guard shared surfaces from drift
tasks.description: src/types/film-state.ts, src/lib/copy.ts, src/types/api.ts, tailwind.config.ts + app/globals.css. Reject any PR that mutates them without coordinated sign-off.

tasks.title: Sequence the critical path
tasks.description: Hold Stratum/Iyo until Leia merges. Hold Leon/Fantem/Nemi/Kaiser/Ghost until Stratum and Iyo are unblocked. Pair Fantem and Nemi for the generation screen ship.

tasks.title: Resolve the name-collision and consolidate Lumen → Nemi
tasks.description: An agent briefed for the streaming-UI scope picked tag 'lumen' to avoid collision with Leia. Canonical name per user brief is Nemi. Lumen's tasks are migrated under tag 'nemi' here. Notify the agent in coordination.md to use tag 'nemi' going forward.

tasks.title: Add framer-motion to package.json (Lumen/Nemi ask #2)
tasks.description: PhaseNarration depends on framer-motion. Suggested ^11.15.0. Should be a Leia-side scaffold patch since package.json is her territory.

tasks.title: Resolve Ghost's blockers from 2026-04-24 entry
tasks.description: Scaffold blocker now resolved. Pending: confirm task-master CLI install path for the team, and resolve git identity (user.name/user.email) so any agent can branch + commit.

tasks.title: Scaffold Next.js 15 App Router (TypeScript, src/)
tasks.description: Create package.json, tsconfig.json, next.config.mjs, postcss.config.mjs, tailwind.config.ts, components.json, app/ layout, and src/ tree. No Pages Router.

tasks.title: Install Tailwind v4 and lock @theme tokens in globals.css
tasks.description: Paste the full @theme block from Design_System §2.1–§2.5 (color/radius/spacing/motion) for dark (default) and light variants. shadcn token names are non-negotiable.

tasks.title: Load Inter, Fraunces, JetBrains Mono via next/font (self-hosted)
tasks.description: Expose fonts as CSS variables (--font-sans, --font-serif, --font-mono) and wire into @theme font-family tokens.

tasks.title: Build typography scale utilities (text-display-xl → text-phase)
tasks.description: Implement the full type scale from Design_System §3 as Tailwind v4 utilities using @utility blocks.

tasks.title: Install shadcn/ui Essential components only (§9.1)
tasks.description: button, input, textarea, card, dialog, dropdown-menu, tooltip, sonner, tabs, avatar, badge, separator. No Important or Skip-for-MVP installs.

tasks.title: Build <RoundedShell /> layout primitive
tasks.description: src/components/shell/RoundedShell.tsx per Design_System §4. Desktop (≥1024): pinned 240px sidebar. Tablet (768–1023): collapsed 64px rail. Mobile (≤767): sidebar replaced by bottom tab bar; shell-gap collapses to 0.

tasks.title: Zustand UI store (theme, sidebarCollapsed, reducedMotionOverride)
tasks.description: src/stores/ui-store.ts persisted to localStorage. src/lib/theme.ts applies the .dark / :root.light class on <html> based on store + system preference.

tasks.title: src/types/film-state.ts — 12-value state enum
tasks.description: Duplicate the canonical enum (pending, parsing, cie_building, character_refs, scene_images_pending, voice_synthesis, music_composition, scene_assembly, final_concat, complete, error, canceled). TODO marker to migrate to @clevroy/types once the shared package exists.

tasks.title: Visual-check page at /dev/tokens
tasks.description: app/(dev)/tokens/page.tsx renders every color, radius, spacing, typography, and motion token plus both theme variants, for Axios to verify fidelity before other agents build on top.

tasks.title: Verify with next build and write coordination.md
tasks.description: Run next build cleanly, then post a status note at /coordination.md pinging Axios.

tasks.title: Patch package.json with framer-motion ^11.15.0
tasks.description: Add to dependencies so Nemi's <PhaseNarration /> can build. Coordinate with Axios (orchestrator task #6).

metadata.description: Leia — Foundation & Design System. Scaffolds Next.js 15 and locks design tokens so every other agent can build on top.

tasks.title: Supabase clients (server + client) with @supabase/ssr
tasks.description: src/lib/supabase/{server.ts,client.ts,middleware.ts}. Wire SUPABASE_URL and SUPABASE_ANON_KEY env vars. Service role key is backend-only — never read on the client.

tasks.title: Auth screens: /sign-in, /sign-up, /forgot-password
tasks.description: No shell, centered card with --radius-2xl on plain --color-background per Design_System §4.3. shadcn form patterns.

tasks.title: Session middleware with EC-N5 expiration handling
tasks.description: src/middleware.ts. Redirect unauth'd app routes to /sign-in. On expired session: preserve return URL in sessionStorage under clevroy_return_to and the Create draft.

tasks.title: TanStack Query provider with sane defaults
tasks.description: staleTime 30s, refetchOnWindowFocus enabled for film state queries.

tasks.title: API client with typed error mapping (CC-6)
tasks.description: src/lib/api/client.ts. Wraps fetch with auth header injection, retry-once on 5xx, and a mapping layer that translates provider error codes into friendly Brand-voice strings. No raw codes leak to UI.

tasks.title: Typed hooks for every Backend_Handoff §8 endpoint
tasks.description: useUser, useRecentFilms, useInProgressFilm, useInfiniteFilms, useCreateFilm, useFilm, useFilmState, useCancelFilm, useReshootScene, useDeleteFilm, useRenameFilm, useDuplicateFilm, useRestoreFilm, useBuyFilms, useStartVoiceTwin, useStartFaceTwin. Match Leon's documented contract in coordination.md. If backend isn't live, mock with msw so other agents can build.

tasks.title: useFilmRealtime hook with reconnect/catch-up (EC-G1, EC-G2)
tasks.description: Subscribes to films:id=eq.{id} and scenes:film_id=eq.{id}. On disconnect: exponential backoff (1s, 2s, 4s, 8s, max 15s). On reconnect: REST catch-up via /api/films/{id}/state, then resume live streaming. Produces ActivityFeedEntry[] events suitable for Nemi's <ActivityFeed />.

tasks.title: Balance store synced via Realtime (EC-N7)
tasks.description: Single Zustand source of truth read by Sidebar, Create CTA, etc. 200ms count-up animation on change.

tasks.title: Extend src/lib/copy.ts with auth + error strings + Realtime event formatters
tasks.description: Add auth screen copy, provider-error friendly mappings, global toast strings, and event-formatter functions Nemi reserved a divider for. Stay inside the Stratum-labeled section.

tasks.title: src/types/api.ts — request/response shapes
tasks.description: Hand-written stub matching Backend_Handoff §8. Coexists with Leon's src/types/film.ts (Leon owns FilmSummary/Film/FilmsListResponse). Stratum owns auth, profile, scene, dialogue, billing, twin shapes. Header TODO references future @clevroy/types pipeline.

metadata.description: Stratum — Data Layer. Supabase, auth, Realtime, API client, copy module. Bridge between Next.js app and backend. Leon, Ghost, and Fantem are blocked on her hooks.

tasks.title: <Sidebar /> per Design_System §5
tasks.description: Five links in exact order: Home, Projects, Create, AI Twin, Settings. Bottom: FilmBalanceBadge, profile chip, wordmark. lucide-react icons 20px / 1.5px stroke. Expanded 240px / collapsed 64px / hidden-mobile.

tasks.title: <BottomTabBar /> per Design_System §6
tasks.description: Five slots, Create as 64px elevated red center button raised 12px above the bar. safe-area-inset-bottom respected. Capacitor light haptic on Create tap.

tasks.title: <FilmBalanceBadge /> with EC-N2 zero-state
tasks.description: Reads Stratum's balance store. 'N films left'. Pulses with --color-primary-soft when balance hits 0.

tasks.title: <InProgressIndicator /> red-dot persistence (EC-G10)
tasks.description: Small red dot on Create sidebar item and tab bar item while any film is generating. Clears on completion.

tasks.title: First-three-opens mobile hint (EC-N1)
tasks.description: Center Create button gets 2s soft glow + 3s caption 'Tap Create to start a film' on first three opens. Persisted as dismissed after three shows or any tab bar interaction.

tasks.title: <ProfileChip /> popover with EC-N4 sign-out
tasks.description: Sign out, theme switch (Light/Dark/System), Help. Sign-out during active generation triggers confirmation modal: 'Sign out? Your film will keep shooting — you'll see it the next time you sign in.'

tasks.title: Keyboard nav per CC-4 (roving tabindex)
tasks.description: Sidebar items reachable via Tab, then Arrow keys move focus among them, Enter activates. 2px --color-ring focus outline always visible.

metadata.description: Iyo — Navigation Shell. Sidebar on desktop/tablet, bottom tab bar on mobile, plus the in-progress film indicator that persists across pages.

tasks.title: Define FilmSummary / Film / FilmsListResponse shapes
tasks.description: src/types/film.ts — response shapes for GET /api/films (Backend_Handoff §8.3). Keep Leia's src/types/film-state.ts untouched (she owns its shape). Cursor-paginated list response, sort enum, helper isFilmInProgress.

tasks.title: Append Leon copy section to src/lib/copy.ts
tasks.description: Add Home, Projects, FilmCard, and empty-state strings under a clearly labeled '// Leon —' section, matching the per-agent section pattern Leia established.

tasks.title: Build FilmCard component family
tasks.description: src/components/film-card/: presentational FilmCard with cover, title, scene count, created date; three-dot overflow (Rename, Duplicate, Delete); 'New' badge until clicked (use-seen-films.ts local store); skeleton matching real layout shape; delete confirmation modal copy 'Delete this film? It can't be recovered.' [Keep it] [Delete it]; block delete when in-progress (EC-N9) with tooltip 'Still being shot. Cancel first, then delete.'.

tasks.title: Build empty-state components
tasks.description: src/components/empty-states/: NoFilmsEmptyState ('No films yet. Paste a script and we'll start shooting.'), FilmNotFound (EC-N8 — identical 404/403 'We couldn't find that film' state), FilmRestore (soft-deleted within 30-day window with Restore CTA), FilmInProgressCard (EC-G3 — used at top of Home recent films row).

tasks.title: Implement /home page
tasks.description: app/(app)/home/page.tsx per Design_System §7.2. H1 'Welcome back, {first_name}', films-left subline + 'Buy more films' link, full-width 'Start a new film' primary card, horizontal Recent films row (max 8, 'View all' to /projects), Film-in-progress card (EC-G3), NoFilmsEmptyState branch. Skeletons matching layout; swap to 'Still loading your films…' after 3s.

tasks.title: Implement /projects page
tasks.description: app/(app)/projects/page.tsx per Design_System §7.3. H1 'Your Films', search input + sort dropdown + 'New film' button toolbar; responsive grid (4/3/2/1 at desktop/tablet/mobile/narrow); useInfiniteFilms via Stratum; intersection observer for infinite scroll; FilmCard rows; same empty state as Home; skeleton grid + 3s 'Still loading' swap.

tasks.title: Coordination note + Stratum hook contract
tasks.description: Prepend a Leon entry to coordination.md documenting (a) what's shipped, (b) the exact useUser / useRecentFilms / useInProgressFilm / useInfiniteFilms / useDeleteFilm / useRenameFilm / useDuplicateFilm / useRestoreFilm hook contracts I depend on from Stratum, (c) Leia scaffold deps still missing (app/ directory, globals.css with @theme, shadcn ui components, RoundedShell), (d) Nemi handoff for app/(app)/films/[id]/page.tsx — Nemi composes my FilmNotFound/FilmRestore for non-success branches.

metadata.description: Leon — Home, Projects, Empty States, FilmCard. Low-animation, TanStack-Query-heavy. Awaiting Stratum hooks for end-to-end verification.

tasks.title: /create input phase per Design_System §7.4
tasks.description: Script textarea (min-height 400px, --color-card bg, 12px radius). Style preset row (Cinematic/Animated/Documentary/Noir/...). Subline 'This will use 1 film from your balance.' Primary CTA 'Start your film' disabled until ≥50 chars. EC-N2 zero-films CTA becomes 'Buy more films to start.'

tasks.title: Draft autosave (EC-N5 restoration)
tasks.description: sessionStorage every 2s while typing. Restored after sign-in flow when session expired mid-script.

tasks.title: Mobile keyboard handling per Design_System §10.4
tasks.description: Sticky CTA above keyboard. Inputs scrollIntoView on focus. iOS 'Done' dismisses by blur.

tasks.title: In-place swap to generation phase on Start
tasks.description: Same /create route, different UI. Use Stratum's useFilmRealtime + useFilmState. Layout per Design_System §8.1 (desktop) and §8.2 (mobile).

tasks.title: <CenterStage /> — 9 phase sub-components
tasks.description: One per state from Design_System §8.4: parsing (script auto-scroll), cie_building/character_refs (character grid), scene_images_pending (full-bleed + ken-burns), voice_synthesis (waveform overlay), music_composition (wide waveform + cycling images), scene_assembly (clip play-once), final_concat (thumbnail strip + playhead), complete (poster + Play), error (last successful + corner badge). 300ms crossfade between phases.

tasks.title: Connection-lost banner (EC-G2)
tasks.description: --color-warning banner slides from top of main panel on socket disconnect. Updates to 'Reconnected.' for 1s on resume, then fades.

tasks.title: Slow-phase subline at p95 / p99 (EC-G9)
tasks.description: p95: subline 'Taking a little longer than usual. Still shooting.' p99: 'This is running slow. You can wait or cancel — your script is saved either way.' Cancel link gains --color-warning border at p99.

tasks.title: Cancel flow (EC-G6)
tasks.description: Bottom-right text link + confirmation modal: 'Stop this generation? You'll get back any unused films.' [Keep going] [Stop]. Mobile: bottom tab bar replaced by Cancel bar during generation. After cancel: 'Stopping…' for ≤5s, then return to /create with original script pre-filled and refund toast.

tasks.title: aria-live wiring on phase narration and errors (CC-5)
tasks.description: polite on phase narration block, assertive on error states. Visual-only animations (ken-burns, waveforms) marked aria-hidden.

tasks.title: Wire Nemi's <SceneStrip />, <ActivityFeed />, <PhaseNarration />
tasks.description: Import from @/components/scene-strip, @/components/activity-feed, @/components/phase-narration (already shipped). Drive scene-strip in live mode via activeSceneId. Pass Stratum's ActivityFeedEntry[] into ActivityFeed.

metadata.description: Fantem — Create page + CenterStage. The product's defining surface (Design_System §8). Pairs with Nemi (whose components are already shipped).

tasks.title: Foundation: film-state enum + copy module (phaseNarration + scene/activity entries)
tasks.description: src/types/film-state.ts holds the 12-state enum with a TODO to migrate to @clevroy/types. src/lib/copy.ts centralizes every user-facing string this stream touches: the full Design_System §8.3 phase→copy table, sceneStripAriaLabel (CC-5), activityFeed labels. A reserved divider at the bottom of copy.ts is where Stratum appends its Realtime event formatters.

tasks.title: <SceneStrip /> component (live + browse modes)
tasks.description: src/components/scene-strip/ per Design_System §8.5. 44×44 mobile / 56×56 desktop pills, 10px radius, 8px gap. Four states (empty/pending/ready/active) plus an error state per EC-G4. Roving tabindex (CC-4), aria-label='Scene {n}, {status}', throttled polite live region for 'Scene N ready.' transitions (CC-5). Pulse disabled under prefers-reduced-motion (CC-2). Auto-scrolls the active pill to horizontal center. Exposes mode: 'live' | 'browse' so Kaiser can reuse it on the Results page.

tasks.title: <ActivityFeed /> component
tasks.description: src/components/activity-feed/ per Design_System §8.6 + EC-G7. HH:MM:SS local timestamps. Color+icon states (● active, ✓ complete, ! warning, ✕ error) — never color alone (CC-5). Auto-scroll while user is at bottom; 'Jump to latest' pill when scrolled up >40px. DOM cap 50 desktop / 30 mobile via matchMedia; older events behind 'View earlier events (N)' collapsible button, expanded in batches of 50 with a TODO to swap in @tanstack/react-virtual. aria-live='polite' throttled to one announcement per 3s.

tasks.title: <PhaseNarration /> component
tasks.description: src/components/phase-narration/ per Design_System §8.3. Fraunces italic 28px headline + Inter muted subline, centered. Framer Motion AnimatePresence crossfade — outgoing 200ms, incoming 450ms with 100ms overlap. useReducedMotion collapses to a single 150ms crossfade (CC-2). aria-live='polite' on the region makes this the canonical screen-reader source of truth for generation phase (CC-5). State→copy comes from src/lib/copy.ts.

tasks.title: Coordination: tasks.json entry + coordination.md note
tasks.description: Tasks recorded under tag 'nemi' (originally posted under tag 'lumen' to avoid collision; Axios consolidated to canonical name). coordination.md note posted to flag agent-name collision and framer-motion dependency.

metadata.description: Nemi — SceneStrip, ActivityFeed, PhaseNarration. Streaming UI that wraps Fantem's <CenterStage />. (This stream temporarily worked under tag 'lumen' due to a name collision; consolidated here by Axios.)

tasks.title: /films/[id] Results page per Design_System §7.5
tasks.description: Three-zone layout. Zone 1 hero player (signed R2 URL fetched on mount), editable title, scene count, duration, 'Created {date}', 'Take it home' dropdown. Zone 2 scene strip in browse mode (reuses Nemi's <SceneStrip mode='browse' onSceneSelect={...} />). Zone 3 tabs: Script | Characters | Voice & Music | Metadata. Compose Leon's FilmNotFound and FilmRestore for non-success branches per Leon's coordination note.

tasks.title: <HeroPlayer /> wired to scene scrubbing
tasks.description: Native video element with custom controls. Clicking a scene-strip thumbnail seeks to that scene's start time.

tasks.title: Reshoot flow (EC-G8)
tasks.description: Three-dot scene menu → 'Reshoot this scene' → confirmation 'Reshoot this scene? It will use 0.2 films from your balance.' [Cancel] [Reshoot]. Disable that scene's reshoot while in-flight; allow parallel reshoots of different scenes. 409 on duplicate → toast 'That scene is already being reshot.'

tasks.title: Error-case Reshoot (EC-G4)
tasks.description: When backend reports scene failure: 'Reshoot scene N' (free — generation failure, no debit). Secondary 'Continue without it' marks film Incomplete and issues partial refund.

tasks.title: <TakeItHomeMenu /> for MP4 / Book PDF / Website ZIP
tasks.description: Async task submission for PDF/ZIP. Poll or subscribe via Stratum's hook for export task status. Toast 'Your {format} is ready' with download link.

tasks.title: Metadata tab — collapsed provider call log + cost breakdown
tasks.description: Generation timestamps, R2 keys, cost per phase. Collapsed by default. Mono font for IDs.

tasks.title: Stub Share button (v1.1) with disabled tooltip
tasks.description: Reserve the slot in the action bar. Tooltip: 'Sharing arrives soon.'

metadata.description: Kaiser — Results page, Reshoot flow, Exports. Post-generation review and take-home.

tasks.title: ESLint copy-audit rule (CC-6 / TEST-18)
tasks.description: Custom or eslint-plugin-regex rule that fails the build on banned words from Brand_Guide §6.3 (Oops, magical, seamless, unleash, simply, AI-powered, etc.) across src/**. Also flag raw JSX strings that bypass src/lib/copy.ts.

tasks.title: Global app-level error boundary + 404
tasks.description: app/error.tsx and app/not-found.tsx using '{Specific thing} didn't load' pattern. Never 'Oops.' Brand_Guide §7.3.

tasks.title: Global toast layer (sonner) for cross-page events
tasks.description: Completion / error / refund toasts fire on any page per EC-G10. 'Your film is ready. Take a look.' / 'Your film hit a problem. We saved what finished.' / 'Stopped. {X.X} films refunded to your balance.'

tasks.title: Onboarding theme-choice step (CC-1)
tasks.description: /onboarding flow: welcome → theme choice → 'start your first film' nudge. Theme step copy: 'Clevroy's studio mode is dark by default. Switch to light if you prefer.' [Keep dark] [Switch to light]. Persisted for life of account.

tasks.title: /settings shell with left-rail subsection nav
tasks.description: Account / Billing / Preferences / Notifications / Developer (feature-flagged) / About. Layout per Design_System §7.7.

tasks.title: Account subsection with delete-account flow
tasks.description: Name, email, password change. Delete account: type 'delete' to confirm; warning 'This deletes all your films permanently. Films can't be recovered.' 30-day soft delete messaging.

tasks.title: Billing subsection — films balance + purchase history
tasks.description: Reuses 'credits' label here (allowed surface per Brand_Guide §5.3). Buy more films flow opens checkout.

tasks.title: Preferences with theme + reduced-motion toggles
tasks.description: Three-way Light/Dark/System theme. Reduced-motion auto-detects but can be forced (CC-2). Language English-only MVP.

tasks.title: Notifications + About + Developer subsections
tasks.description: Notifications: email toggles, marketing opt-in. About: version, legal links. Developer (feature-flagged): raw provider response IDs, JSON data export.

tasks.title: /ai-twin page per Design_System §7.6
tasks.description: Voice twin card (status, record samples, playback, delete). Face twin card (drag-drop 5–10 photos with click fallback per CC-3, training progress, reference portrait preview, delete). 'How your twin is used' explainer below.

tasks.title: AI Twin training failure handling (EC-N10)
tasks.description: --color-warning state with plain-language reason. Files preserved 24h. 'Try again with these photos' vs 'Start over.' Third failure adds 'Why this might be failing' help modal with photo requirements.

tasks.title: Final accessibility sweep (axe + manual)
tasks.description: Run axe on each route. Verify 44×44 hit areas (CC-3). Verify focus trap on modals and focus-return on close (CC-4, TEST-16). File issues per offending agent.

tasks.title: Continuous copy audit across PRs
tasks.description: Review every PR for banned-word usage and src/lib/copy.ts compliance. Add new keys as needed under Ghost's section.

metadata.description: Ghost — Settings, AI Twin, onboarding, global edge cases, copy audit, a11y sweep. Earlier scaffold blocker resolved by Leia. Still pending: task-master CLI install + git identity (orchestrator #7).
